task: Repair the broken Leaflet viewport shown in the Project Architect screenshot
symptom: Most of the map stage is blank gray while only a small tile patch renders in the lower-right area.
diagnosis: Leaflet initialized or retained stale container dimensions while the Safari viewport, browser chrome, or control drawer layout changed.
required_behaviour: The map must fill the entire map stage on desktop, iPad landscape, iPad portrait, and mobile Safari.
Leaflet must invalidate its size after initial load, pageshow, viewport resize, orientation change, drawer transitions, visibility restoration, and observed map-container resize.
After initial stabilization or orientation change, the Lagos-Ibadan governed corridor must be refitted without animation.
The density figures, actual-point anchors, route line, toolbar, road shield, legend, and simulation banner must remain correctly positioned.
No crash records, death counts, or coordinates may be changed to solve the rendering defect.
acceptance_tests: No large unrendered gray region remains after the page settles.
Map tiles cover the full #map bounding rectangle.
Rotating an iPad does not leave stale or partial tiles.
Opening or closing the drawer does not break tiles or overlays.
The four simulated fatal records and their summaries remain unchanged.
GeoAware quality gate and JavaScript syntax checks pass.
